summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Alpha Agency - Pipeline columns management (P1), mobile responsive views (P0 fix), and Budget module (Phase 1). All backend APIs passed (22/22 tests). Frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pipeline/columns - Returns list of columns (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/pipeline/columns - Creates new column (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/pipeline/columns - Rejects duplicate column ID (400)
Backend: PUT /api/pipeline/columns/{id} - Updates column (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/pipeline/columns/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: DELETE /api/pipeline/columns/{id} - Deletes column (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/pipeline/columns/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: GET /api/budget/transactions - Returns transactions list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/transactions - Supports filters (type, month)
Backend: POST /api/budget/transactions - Creates transaction (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/budget/transactions/{id} - Updates transaction (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/transactions/{id} - Deletes transaction (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/transactions/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: GET /api/budget/categories - Returns categories list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/budget/categories - Creates category (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/budget/categories/{id} - Updates category (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/categories/{id} - Deletes category (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/budget/categories/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: GET /api/budget/transactions/summary - Returns summary (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/summary - Returns budget summary (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/budget/monthly-chart - Returns 12 months chart data (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/pipeline - Returns pipeline data with all statuses (200 OK)
Frontend: Login page loads and authentication works
Frontend: Pipeline page loads in desktop view with all 5 columns
Frontend: Pipeline page mobile view (400px) - horizontal scroll container present
Frontend: Pipeline 'Ajouter une étape' button opens column creation dialog
Frontend: Pipeline column creation dialog has name input and color picker
Frontend: Pipeline column menu (3-dots) shows 'Modifier' and 'Supprimer' options
Frontend: Tasks page loads in desktop view with kanban columns
Frontend: Tasks page mobile view (400px) - horizontal scroll container present
Frontend: Budget page loads with summary cards (Revenus, Dépenses, Résultat, Non catégorisé)
Frontend: Budget tabs functional (Vue d'ensemble, Transactions, Catégories, Règles auto)
Frontend: Budget Overview tab shows monthly evolution chart and expense breakdown
Frontend: Budget Transactions tab shows empty state with 'Importer un relevé' button
Frontend: Budget Categories tab shows default categories for Revenus and Dépenses
Frontend: Budget Categories tab has 'Nouvelle catégorie' button
Frontend: Budget Rules tab shows auto-categorization rules section
seed_data_creation: Test pipeline column, budget transaction, and budget category created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline columns management (P1) fully tested - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE APIs working. Mobile responsive fix (P0) verified - both Pipeline and Tasks pages have horizontal scroll at 400px viewport. Budget module Phase 1 tested - transactions, categories, rules APIs working. Default budget categories are displayed in frontend (CA Client, Freelance, Autre revenu for income; Marketing, Outils, Abonnements, Loyer/Bureau, Formation, Déplacements, Autre dépense for expenses). Pipeline has 5 default columns: Nouveau, Qualifié, Devis envoyé, Gagné, Perdu.
